sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30997" key="ei)kosieptaeth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἰκοσῐ-επτᾰετής</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n30997.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">twenty-seven years old, Annales du Service</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0627.tlg048:22:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
